source: FERC Office of Enforcement, Division of Audits & Accounting
source_note: Listed on FERC ferc.gov/audits via Internet Archive Wayback Machine (snapshot 2021-12-07; origin www.ferc.gov); report PDF from FERC eLibrary, accession 20150730-3041 (fileID 13944747).

findings.title: Nuclear Decommissioning Trust Fund Reports
findings.summary: Entergy filed trust fund financial reports annually with the Commission, but the reports did not include some trust funds containing monies collected from wholesale customers. Moreover, for the trust funds reported, the company did not include all required information.
